hero.subtitle: Architectural Integrity Server
hero.description: A specialized protocol layer for enforcing FSD boundaries, semantic standards, and project-specific constraints. Validating code through deterministic rules instead of ephemeral prompts.

rules.title: Rules Enforcement
rules.description: Zero-tolerance boundary checks and dependency validation.

fsd.title: FSD Governance
fsd.description: Deep structural analysis of layers and entity boundaries.

naming.title: Semantic Naming
naming.description: Enforcing consistent file patterns and variable naming.

error_boundary.title: Error Boundary
error_boundary.description: Failure isolation and preventing UI-wide crashes.

deterministic.title: Deterministic Rules
deterministic.description: Executable specifications that override prompt drift.

clean.title: Clean Code Protocol
clean.description: Continuous integrity monitoring for every code modification.
